title: 🚀 Launcher v1.1 Released
description: A major update introducing improved navigation, better performance, and a refreshed user experience throughout the launcher.

title: 🎉 Double XP Weekend
description: Join participating servers this weekend and earn double experience points across all supported game modes.

title: 🛠 Server Browser Improved
description: The server browser now loads faster and displays additional information such as player counts and server status.

title: 🏆 New Leaderboard Season
description: A fresh competitive season has started. Climb the rankings and earn exclusive rewards before the season ends.

title: 🎁 Daily Rewards Added
description: Log in every day to receive free rewards including coins, cosmetics, and bonus experience boosts.

title: 🌍 New DayZ Community Server
description: A brand-new DayZ server has joined the launcher, featuring custom events and an active community.

title: 🧟 Project Zomboid Expansion Event
description: Survivors can now participate in a limited-time event featuring unique loot locations and challenges.

title: ⚡ Faster Launcher Startup
description: Startup times have been reduced significantly, helping players get into their favorite servers quicker.

title: 🔒 Security Improvements
description: Several backend improvements have been deployed to enhance account security and service stability.

title: 💰 Coin Bonus Event
description: Earn 50% more coins from gameplay activities during this week's special bonus event.

title: 📢 Community Feedback Update
description: Multiple community-requested improvements have been implemented based on player suggestions.

title: 🎨 New Profile Customization
description: Players can now customize their profiles with additional avatars, banners, and account themes.

title: 🏅 VIP Benefits Expanded
description: VIP members now receive additional perks including priority queue access and monthly rewards.

title: 📦 Patch Deployment Complete
description: The latest launcher patch has been successfully deployed with bug fixes and stability enhancements.

title: 🔥 Summer Survival Challenge
description: Compete against other players in a month-long survival challenge for exclusive prizes and recognition.
